topic_level_recall_note: every observational study that entered pooling was captured AND correctly included
anchor_forest_RCT_recall: ~0/25 by abstract search (rare-event gap; AE counts sourced from anchor MA, not abstracts)
screening_precision_adjudicated: 30/30 = 1.000 (Wilson 95% CI 0.89-1.00); all sampled screener-includes are protocol-correct GLP-1 x neuropsychiatric records per the abstract-informed ledger reasons
independent_titleonly_agreement: 22/30 = 0.733 raw; all 8 disagreements are the title-only checker missing an abstract-documented neuropsychiatric outcome (weaker instrument), not screener errors
note_on_instrument: the independent LLM check used TITLES only; the screener uses title+abstract, so title-only disagreement is expected and does not indicate a screener false positive
